chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 316 of 2023 C.P.No. D- 365 of 2023 C.P.No. D- 385 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 2347/23. 3.For hearing of CMA 1408/23. 4.For hearing of main case. 26-04-2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner in C.P No.D-316/2023 and for respondent No.5 in C.P.No.D-365/2023. Syed Jaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for respondent No.4 in C.P.No.D-316 of 2023. Petitioner Muhammad Tariq Mahesar in person in C.P.No.D-385 of 2023. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the parties as well as petitioner in person in C.P.No.D-385 of 2023 file a joint statement seeking disposal of listed petitions in the following terms: “1. That all the members of last election 2020 shall stand restored, subject to payment of all outstanding arrears of KAC in accordance with constitution of KAC. 2. That after 2020 the record of new members shall be verified by Deputy Commissioner Khairpur, and if new memberships are made in accordance with constitution of KAC they shall be allowed to cast votes in upcoming election. 3. That in finalizing the list of members the Deputy Commissioner Khairpur or committee shall hear both the parties that whether dues of members who have paid their dues are to be verified by Deputy Commissioner Khairpur through bank statement”. Since the joint statement is voluntary and without any coercion, let Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur conduct elections of Khairpur Arts Council (KAC) as per schedule, submitted by him. In case, in

Since the joint statement is voluntary and without any coercion, let Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur conduct elections of Khairpur Arts Council (KAC) as per schedule, submitted by him. In case, in Page 2 of 2 compliance of aforementioned terms, the Deputy Commissioner needs more time, he shall be at liberty to re-schedule election process of KAC. Instant petitions stand disposed of in the above terms along with pending application(s). Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
